name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to AlmaBridge Community Edition
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## User or Institution Need

Who needs this and why?

## Suggested Workflow

Describe how the feature should work.

## Trust, Privacy or Assurance Impact

Explain any implications for credential trust, learner privacy, issuer governance, verification or auditability.

## Edition Boundary

Should this be Community, Pro, Assurance or Enterprise?
